_comment: Aggressive ko rewrite — convert to pure English canonical search terms (using doc retrieval-anchor-keywords). Tests whether converting Korean queries to English unleashes Jina v5's English advantage. UX trade-off: this no longer reflects natural learner language; ranks queries as system search rather than user expression.
